title: Iron Maiden2 anime
wikitext:
[]: Iron Maiden2 anime?             Quote Post by libra » Fri Sep 09, 2005 9:46 pm Does anyone know if there are any plans to animate the Iron Maiden manga.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Fri Sep 09, 2005 11:53 pm Gainax is always cooking up wacky ideas, recently, there was rumors of an Eva prequel. I would not be surprised if something like Iron Maiden made it to animation. It's more likely then seeing a continuation of Evangelion, and possibly more likely than seeing an American made live action Evangelion film. I don't know how well it would do, but part of me doesn't want to find out. I don't know for sure, but the idea may well have come up, but there is no plans as of now to animate anything Eva related.

[]:             Quote Post by reagen » Fri Sep 30, 2005 8:39 am Well, I'm not gonna wait for the US version of Live-Action Evangelion. Because I think somehow it's gonna turn out bad, no matter who did it!! But, i would really love to see an Iron maiden 2 anime!! Any moren infos?

[]:             Quote Post by Digitalex » Fri Sep 30, 2005 9:30 am reagen wrote: Well, I'm not gonna wait for the US version of Live-Action Evangelion. Because I think somehow it's gonna turn out bad, no matter who did it!! But, i would really love to see an Iron maiden 2 anime!! Any moren infos?

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Fri Sep 30, 2005 12:05 pm I kind of like the designs in Girlfriend of Steel 2, and also, Shinji Ikari Raising sim. Its fresh, different, something new to look at.

[]:             Quote Post by reagen » Sat Oct 01, 2005 3:34 am Yeah.., it's always good to see some fresh new design!! It doesn't have that much difference to me!! Rei still looks like Rei!!

[]:             Quote Post by TheBlueTree » Fri Nov 25, 2005 8:58 pm OK ok OK! i just spent acouple fracking long hours reading the iron maiden girlfriend of steel what-cha-mah-call-it thing on posted on this site, im looking at the last page available.... "the name most important to me is..." TO BE CONTINUED WHAT!!!!!!!!!! WHERE IS THE ENDING!!! I WAS SO PUMPED!!!!! im so mad right now....

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Fri Nov 25, 2005 10:08 pm Calm down now. It was licensed, so ADTRW ceased scanlating it. I have all the scanlations up because it isn't available as a standalone product, and isn't available in all English speaking areas. It's still on going in Japan, and will be out as a graphic novel eventually.

[]:             Quote Post by TheBlueTree » Fri Nov 25, 2005 10:14 pm arg.... I hate waiting... but oh well cant be helped I guess I'll have to wait to see the end of this pointless but fun spin off

[]:             Quote Post by Eternal Yamcha » Fri Nov 25, 2005 11:00 pm It'd be nice to know of something Evangelion related and be there since the beginning. I kind of feel "left in the dust" when it comes to Evangelion since I really didn't become the fan I am now until a couple years ago. Then again, as far as I know, the original manga isn't done yet... I got that. Unfortunately, I've only played GoS 1 and nothing else Evangelion related. Which really sucks, I'd like to play the games. Edit: I'm for it if Gainax has their hands in it. If they don't have enough control over the production, it might not turn out as good.

[]:             Quote Post by rb_182_ » Sat Nov 26, 2005 12:17 am I think they should just leave Evangelion alone

[]:             Quote Post by Space Penis » Sat Nov 26, 2005 1:11 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: I kind of like the designs in Girlfriend of Steel 2, and also, Shinji Ikari Raising sim. Its fresh, different, something new to look at.
